name: ycc-pos
description: Sistema POS completo para Country Club

scripts.build: cd 03_API_GATEWAY && npx prisma generate && pnpm build && cd ../04_CORE_POS && pnpm build && cd ../05_KDS_SYSTEM && pnpm build && cd ../06_ADMIN_PANEL && pnpm build
scripts.typecheck: cd 03_API_GATEWAY && pnpm typecheck && cd ../04_CORE_POS && pnpm typecheck && cd ../05_KDS_SYSTEM && pnpm typecheck && cd ../06_ADMIN_PANEL && pnpm typecheck
scripts.test: cd 03_API_GATEWAY && pnpm test && cd ../04_CORE_POS && pnpm test && cd ../05_KDS_SYSTEM && pnpm test && cd ../06_ADMIN_PANEL && pnpm test
